allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
sec: Scrub employer and client names from resume, update PDF

Remove identifiable employer and client names from HTML resume
and replace with generalized industry descriptors. Update resume
PDF with scrubbed version.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Update resume content to mirror latest PDF

Update professional summary, expand technical skills from 4 to 8
categories, consolidate experience to current role with new bullets,
add personal projects section, update education timeline, and add
in-progress AWS certifications.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
